title: HB Pencils, 12 Pack of Hexagonal Graphite Pencils, Break Resistant Super Bonded HB Lead Pencil, Ideal for Drawing and School Essentials, Home Sketching Pencil or Office Writing Pencils
features: Superb Quality: EziGLIDE HB Graphite Pencils are great for all your daily writing tasks, note-taking, drafting designing and drawing and Sketching Pencils for School, Work and Home
Design: Easy grip HB Pencil with hexagonal wooden barrel specifically designed to prevent splintering, making them easier to sharpen & compatible with all standard pencil sharpeners
Graphite Lead Pencils: EziGLIDE has worked on an unbreakable pencil, ensuring a break-resistant & super-bonded HB lead, robust for school environments where dropping, tapping & bashing is inevitable!
Versatile: Drawing & Writing pencils for kids of all ages used as right or left handed pencils. Pencils HB make a great carpenters pencil, builders pencil, art pencils, work pencils & school pencils
12 Pack of pencils, HB Graphite - Professional quality, great for artists of all ages with a smooth graphite unbreakable lead that makes writing, drawing and sharpening a breeze
